scripts.start:blog: cross-env FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=foliokit-6f974 nx serve blog --port=4201
scripts.publish:cms-core: nx build cms-core && npm publish dist/libs/cms-core --access public
scripts.publish:cms-ui: nx build cms-ui && npm publish dist/libs/cms-ui --access public
scripts.publish:cms-admin-ui: nx build cms-admin-ui && npm publish dist/libs/cms-admin-ui --access public --tag next
scripts.publish:cms-markdown: nx build cms-markdown && npm publish dist/libs/cms-markdown --access public
scripts.publish:docs-ui: nx build docs-ui && npm publish dist/libs/docs-ui --access public
scripts.publish:libs: npm run build:libs && npm publish dist/libs/cms-core --access public && npm publish dist/libs/cms-ui --access public && npm publish dist/libs/cms-markdown --access public && npm publish dist/libs/cms-admin-ui --access public --tag next && npm publish dist/libs/docs-ui --access public
scripts.deploy:admin: nx build admin --configuration=production && firebase deploy --only hosting:foliokit-admin --project foliokit-6f974
scripts.deploy:docs: nx build docs --configuration=production && firebase deploy --only hosting:foliokit-docs --project foliokit-6f974
scripts.deploy:functions: cd functions && npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions --project foliokit-6f974
scripts.dev:seed-after-emulator: npm run dev:wait-emulator && npm run seed
scripts.dev:blog: npm run dev:wait-emulator && npm run start:blog
scripts.dev:admin: npm run dev:wait-emulator && npm run start:admin
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "emulator,seed,blog,admin" -c "cyan,yellow,green,blue" "npm run emulator" "npm run dev:seed-after-emulator" "npm run dev:blog" "npm run dev:admin"
